entry.title: Regular signet reorgs
entry.summary: The discussion includes a mention of "signet-2," which is identified as a backup measure in case the "inquisition node" fails to build a block. This setup indicates a contingency plan within a technological framework, possibly related to blockchain or networking systems where nodes and signets play critical roles in maintaining functionality and system integrity. The reference to these components suggests a complex, layered infrastructure designed to ensure continuous operation even when primary systems encounter issues.
